title: Dropdown
description: A comprehensive dropdown system consisting of a dropdown box component for triggering dropdowns and a dropdown panel component for displaying dropdown content. The dropdown box provides interactive functionality with keyboard support, while the dropdown panel offers flexible positioning and content display options.

props.name: placement
props.description: The placement position of the dropdown panel relative to its target element.

props.name: adaptivityEnabled
props.description: Determines if adaptivity is enabled for the component, allowing it to adjust its behavior based on screen size.

props.name: _target
props.description: Gets or sets the target HTML element for the dropdown panel positioning.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates if the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index of the component for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOpened
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown panel is opened.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown panel is closed.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles the popover open or closed, if not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Switches between open and closed states.
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Closes the popover if it is open and not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Popover is closed and focus returns to the target.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Opens the popover if it is not already open and not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Popover becomes open and receives focus.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Gets whether the popover is currently open.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if open; otherwise false.
 */
get isOpen(): boolean

/**
 * Gets whether the popover is styled as an actionsheet.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if styled as actionsheet; otherwise false.
 */
get isActionsheetStyle(): boolean

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Component receives focus.
 */
focus(): void

props.name: hasInput
props.description: Determines if the dropdown box has an input field. When true, applies editor container styling.

props.name: popoverWidth
props.description: The width of the popover content. Can be set to 'auto' or a specific CSS width value.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates if the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index of the component for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onOpened
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown box is opened.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted when the dropdown box is closed.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look style changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the position of the popover.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The popover position is recalculated and updated.
 */
updatePosition(): void

/**
 * Toggles the popover open or closed, if not disabled.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Switches between open and closed states.
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Closes the popover if it is open and not disabled, then focuses the element.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Popover is closed and focus returns to the target.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Opens the popover if it is not already open and not disabled, then focuses the popover.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Popover becomes open and receives focus.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Gets whether the popover is currently open.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if open; otherwise false.
 */
get isOpen(): boolean

/**
 * Gets whether the popover is styled as an actionsheet.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if styled as actionsheet; otherwise false.
 */
get isActionsheetStyle(): boolean

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Component receives focus.
 */
focus(): void
